title: In Development magazine
subtitle: A new venture, focusing on evidence-based approaches to economic development globally. Here is Paul Niehaus on GiveDirectly and the evidence for cash-based transfers. Here is the home page and a link to subscribe. The post In Development magazine appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
